name: Calculadora Area Triangulo
desc: Calcule Area = (base × height) / 2. Exemplo: base 8 m, height 5 m = Area = 20 m². Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem registo.
description: Calcule Area = (base × height) / 2. Exemplo: base 8 m, height 5 m = Area = 20 m². Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem registo.
seo_description: Calcule Area = (base × height) / 2. Exemplo: base 8 m, height 5 m = Area = 20 m². Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem registo.
example_label: Calculate the area of a triangular roof section with 14.5m base and 8.75m height for material estimation

range_hints.base: Typical: 1-100m for construction; any positive value
range_hints.altura: Must be perpendicular height; range: 0.5-200m typical

result_context: The area ({area}) represents the surface of the triangle, calculated as half the product of base and perpendicular height.
mistakes: Using slant height instead of perpendicular height from base to apex
Forgetting to divide by 2 (calculating as rectangle instead)
Not ensuring height is measured at 90° to the base
